name: FeatureFlag
description: A Split feature flag (split) representing a toggle for controlled feature rollouts and experimentation.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Unique name of the feature flag within the workspace.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable description of the feature flag.

fields.name: trafficType
fields.description: The traffic type defining which entity kind the flag targets (e.g., user, account).

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the traffic type.

fields.name: creationTime
fields.description: Unix timestamp of when the feature flag was created.

fields.name: tags
fields.description: Tags associated with the feature flag for organization and filtering.
